[METADATA/INTRO]: McClain: The Biden Administration is Putting Leftist Politics Before Women and Girls in Sports WASHNGTON—Subcommittee on Health Care and Financial Services Chairwoman Lisa McClain (R-Mich.) today opened a subcommittee hearing titled “The Importance of Protecting Female Athletics and Title IX.”...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: McClain: The Biden Administration is Putting Leftist Politics Before Women and Girls in Sports 
 WASHNGTON—Subcommittee on Health Care and Financial Services Chairwoman Lisa McClain (R-Mich.) today opened a subcommittee hearing titled “The Importance of Protecting Female Athletics and Title IX.” Subcommittee Chairwoman McClain opened the hearing by discussing how instead of defending the hard-fought protections that Title IX secured, the Biden Administration has proposed rules that will drastically alter Title IX and put leftist politics before women and girls. 
 Below are Subcommittee Chairwoman McClain’s remarks as prepared for delivery. 
 Men do not belong in women’s sports. Let me say it one more time. Men do not belong in women’s sports. Period.

[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Sen. Marsha Blackburn (R-Tenn.) said at a Wednesday hearing the “foundational question” of her renewed effort to write a privacy law is the question of ownership rights over consumer data. 
 Ahead of the session, we sat down with Blackburn to discuss what that might include, the future of the AI regulatory moratorium for states and more.
